files.change: add extractImageThumb() — 512px JPG downscale (no upscale) via bundled ffmpeg
import + save-generation image branches call extractImageThumb; drop isVideo gate on replace-thumb cleanup; new /backfill-image-thumbs route
thumbPath moved into baseProps so image items carry it (was video-only)
image render prefers selected.thumbPath over filePath
snapshot-save + add-to-gallery image items pass thumbPath; snapshot emit includes thumbPath
fire-and-forget _backfillImageThumbs on project open; patch live items + rebuild grid
